name: Nanakuli Beach Park
tagline: A wide sandy beach on the Waianae coast with some of the most fiery sunsets you'll see on the island.
bestTime: Late afternoon for golden light and sunsets; summer for calmer swimming
talkStory: Nanakuli is a local community beach — not on any tourist radar, which is part of the appeal. The sunsets from this stretch of coast are insane because you're facing due west with nothing between you and the horizon. In summer the water is gentle enough for the kids; winter can bring big surf. Be mindful that this is a tight-knit neighborhood — show respect and aloha and you'll get it back tenfold.
